programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Det frygtløse hold bag Ghost Adventures er tilbage! I hver episode rejser spøgelsesjægerne Zak Bagans og Aaron Goodwin sammen med teknikerne Billy Tolley og Jay Wasley til en hjemsøgt destination, hvor de mødes med lokale, øjenvidner og eksperter for at undersøge spøgelseshistorierne fra hvert sted. Ved hjælp af den nyeste, videnskabelige teknologi og gadgets sætter holdet deres efterforskning i gang om natten, hvor de konfronterer den paranormale aktivitet og dokumenterer beviserne i håbet om at afdække sandheden bag hvert af de hjemsøgende mysterier.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman og hans kammerater risikerede alt i Sydamerika og tabte. I stedet for at grave guld og diamanter op, har mændene på det fremmede kontinent kun oplevet bitre tilbageslag og skuffelser. Vover vovehalsene i Alaskas vildmark at starte forfra, eller er drømmen om berømmelse og rigdom væk for altid?

programme.title: Metrovagterne
programme.desc: Metroen i Stockholm er byens pulsåre. Med over en million daglige rejsende, er der rigeligt at se til for metroens sikkerhedspersonale, og vi kommer her helt tæt på de ansattes arbejde under jorden.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Da Barbra Christiansen redder to afmagrede hunde, starter Houston SPCAs kamp for at redde deres liv. Efterforskerne griber også ind, da nogle katte bliver efterladt i deres hus.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Holdet redder en forsømt boxer. Samtidig redder chefefterforsker Max Mixson en hund med en alvorlig skade, og kirurgerne forsøger at redde dens liv.

programme.title: Toucan Nation
programme.desc: TOUCAN NATION er den opløftende historie om Grecia. Grecia er en tukan som gennem hele sit liv er blevet holdt i fangenskab og mishandlet. Sagen har skabt stor international vrede og fordømmelse, hvor flere dyrevelfærdsorganisationer har startet en ny bevægelse i Costa Rica.

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: Kevin er træner for lilleputfodboldholdet Cowboys. Da han afviser at lade sin niece komme med på holdet ­- hun er jo en pige - overtaler hun sin far til at danne sit eget hold, Little Giants, hvor hun kan være med. Holdet består af de værst tænkelige spillere, men de vil tage kampen op mod Cowboys.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The long-running game show sees more rival antique collectors test their skills at spotting a bargain. Two teams - the reds and the blues - set out with just £300 and one hour to scour an antiques fair and buy three items to sell at auction. An antiques expert guides each team, giving them hints and tips on what to buy in the hope they make more profit than their rivals when their items go under the hammer.

programme.title: Money for Nothing

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Along the way, he explores their unique lifestyles, the challenges they face, and the freedoms they’ve discovered by stepping away from the conventional rat race.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads: The Extra Mile
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert presents a selection of some of the funniest and most dramatic moments from the series.

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks With Bill Bailey
programme.desc: Comedian, musician and nature lover Bill Bailey takes some famous faces for an amble and a ramble on some of the UKs most spectacular pub walks

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: Residents living off the grid in the remote regions of Northern Canada fight to survive the winter in one of the most hostile environments, facing hungry predators and daily temperatures well below zero degrees Fahrenheit with only limited resources.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: Discover the remarkable secrets of the worlds greatest treasures; a team of scientists examines each object using a range of new techniques, including state-of-the art forensics.

programme.title: Tutankhamun with Dan Snow
programme.desc: Towering pyramids. Chambers of treasure. Dramatic rituals. This fascinating series travels back over 3,000 years to retrace the final 100 days of ancient Egypts most legendary pharaoh Tutankhamun. Find out what daily life was like for the 19-year-old king as he ruled over one of the ancient worlds most advanced civilizations.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Documentary series following the struggles and triumphs of very different farming families in beautiful and remote landscapes.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong discovers both the rich culture and beautiful beaches of Sri Lanka. During his trip, he visits Sinhalese areas in the central and southern regions as well as the less-travelled Tamil north.

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace and Cherry Healey hit factory floors across Britain for a snoop around their supersized production lines. What are the secrets behind our supermarket staples?

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Travel back to ancient history from a new perspective and integrate the moving stories of the Eastern and Western worlds.

programme.title: Panorama: Can Climate Scientists Save the World?
programme.desc: Panorama meets some of the brightest minds in climate science advocating more drastic action to halt climate catastrophe - including controlling the power of the weather.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Along the way, he explores their unique lifestyles, the challenges they face, and the freedoms they’ve discovered by stepping away from the conventional rat race.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: One of the most famous bibliographic references of all time, George Bradshaws Guide to the Continental Railway, serves as the guidebook for this documentary series. A total of five episodes will showcase the different European routes covered in this guide, published in 1913, which marked a turning point for British tourists during the Edwardian era. Gleaming cosmopolitan cities, alpine landscapes, warm, sparkling seas, and picturesque villages are some of the places Bradshaw describes in his book, known precisely for sparking an interest among English citizens in the exoticism of foreign travel.

programme.title: Inside Our Minds
programme.desc: Inside Our Autistic Minds follows the journey of autistic individuals as they collaborate with filmmakers, animators, designers, and musicians to create powerful short films that express their inner experiences. Guided by Chris, the project helps them communicate thoughts and emotions they’ve struggled to share, offering their families and friends a deeper understanding of their world—and revealing the rich, complex lives often hidden beneath the surface.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. programme.title: Wonders of the Solar System
programme.desc: In this captivating series, Professor Brian Cox journeys to some of Earth’s most dramatic and remote landscapes to uncover how the fundamental laws of physics have shaped not only our planet, but the entire solar system. From towering mountains to vast deserts, he reveals the powerful forces at work in nature—and how they connect us to the wonders of the cosmos.

programme.title: Hurricane Man
programme.desc: Storm-chaser Josh Morgerman heads into the fourth most powerful hurricane to hit mainland American since records began. Category 4 Hurricane Michael brings wind speeds of 155mph and unleashes more energy than an atomic bomb on Floridas Panama City.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries
programme.desc: An international team of experts reveal the shocking true stories behind ancient Egypts most infamous mummies. Using modern forensic science, they uncover horrific tales of life and death in one of historys most vicious and turbulent empires.

programme.title: Rachel Khoos Cosmopolitan Cook
programme.desc: Passionate and creative cook Rachel Khoo goes in search of new ideas in this vibrant and fascinating series. Rachel travels to some of the most beautiful foodie countries in the world, heading for cosmopolitan locations both urban and rural to get inspiration for dinner parties with her friends back home. Rachel gets under the skin of the local cuisine, showing two very different culinary influences, such as Barcelona and rural Spain, or in Italy, Naples and the Amalfi coast.

programme.title: Den iskolde vildmark
programme.desc: Det ekstreme liv i Alaska. Vintrene i Alaska er ekstremt barske med temperaturer helt ned under minus 62 grader. Følg fire familier, der er bosat i forskellige hjørner af Alaska, og deres kamp for at komme helskindet igennem den lange, ubarmhjertige vinter i området.

programme.title: Human
programme.desc: Palæoantropologen Ella Al-Shamahi afslører menneskehedens utrolige historie gennem 300.000 års menneskelig evolution – og hvordan historien er underligere og mere overraskende end vi nogensinde kunne forestille os.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres store show
programme.desc: I denne uge har vi live-musik fra Snow Patrol og stand-up fra Kerry Godliman - og serien afrundes selvfølgelig af det uundværlige indslag "Send to All". I denne uge rækker Alan Carr modigt sin telefon til Michael, der sender en sms til alle i hans adressebog.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon is back in the hosts chair for the fifth series of the hit comedy panel show Would I Lie To You? And as ever, David Mitchell and Lee Mack are the lightning-quick team captains. Over the course of each show, a stellar a cast of celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves, some of which are true, and some of which are not.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 hours in...
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and guests deliver the definitive guide to a weekend away in some of the world’s most amazing destinations. Accompanied by some of the funniest performers from screen and stage Travel Mangives the low down on famous attractions and obscure delights.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The irreverent BAFTA award-winning chat show hosted by Graham Norton. Each episode is brim full of chat, comedy, celebrity gossip and hilarious absurdities. Theres just enough risque material to make viewers and guests cringe with delight and at the end of each episode, Graham introduces some of the best contemporary music acts to wrap things up and finish the show off with a bang.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: In the historic town of Stratford-upon-Avon, eccentric private detectives Luella Shakespeare and Frank Hathaway join forces to crack curious cases and outsmart criminals. With Luella’s intuition and Frank’s street-smart instincts, this unconventional duo tackles mysteries filled with twists, humour, and intrigue, proving that opposites really do make the best crime-solvers.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Hosted by the ever-witty Jimmy Carr, the stars of 8 Out of 10 Cats team up with celebrity guests to take on the iconic words and numbers game show. programme.title: Robson Green: Worlds Most Amazing Walks
programme.desc: Actor Robson Green takes viewers on an adventure through some of the most incredible and awe-inspiring landscapes on the planet. Each journey is filled with breath-taking vistas, fascinating history and bewitching wildlife, with a new discovery at every turn. Along the way, Robson immerses himself in both the landscapes and the stories of the people he meets, making for powerful and emotional journeys through some of the worlds most beautiful regions.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Human

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Michael McIntyres very special comedy entertainment show arrives on Comedy Central, with big stars, big laughs and big surprises!

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

programme.title: Robson Green: Worlds Most Amazing Walks
programme.desc: Actor Robson Green takes viewers on an adventure through some of the most incredible and awe-inspiring landscapes on the planet. Each journey is filled with breath-taking vistas, fascinating history and bewitching wildlife, with a new discovery at every turn. Along the way, Robson immerses himself in both the landscapes and the stories of the people he meets, making for powerful and emotional journeys through some of the worlds most beautiful regions.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The irreverent BAFTA award-winning chat show hosted by Graham Norton. Each episode is brim full of chat, comedy, celebrity gossip and hilarious absurdities. Theres just enough risque material to make viewers and guests cringe with delight and at the end of each episode, Graham introduces some of the best contemporary music acts to wrap things up and finish the show off with a bang.

programme.desc: Mød Ko og Kylling, der lever i et forstadshus med menneskelige forældre, menneskelige venner og umenneskelige eventyr. Heldigvis for Kylling, der nok forstår at sætte grå fjer i hovedet på sine omgivelser, har Ko et alterego kendt som Super Ko.

programme.desc: Det er eventyrtid! Gå ikke glip af Finn, Jake og alle deres venner, når de begiver sig ud på deres største eventyr nogensinde i landet Ooo. Find ud af mere om Marceline, Prinsesse Sukkermås, Iskongen og de andre venner.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Den kampsport-elskende Lan Jun, en helt særlig teenageheltinde, der skal lære sin families ældgamle hemmeligheder og afsløre det uventede, alt imens hun navigerer i livet som teenager.

programme.title: Den tapre prins Ivandoes heroiske færd
programme.desc: I en verden af helte, kongelige rivaliseringer og magiske eventyrvæsner, følger vi en ung mand på sit livs eventyr. Ledsaget af sin loyale væbner Bert, drager prins Ivandoe ud på en rejse gennem De Fem Kongeriger for at gøre krav på den gyldne fjer.

programme.title: Gumballs (for)underlige verden
programme.desc: Velkommen tilbage til Elmore hvor Gumball, Darwin, Anais tager dig med på en rejse med vildere historier, større twists, og surrealistisk humor.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Bunnicula
programme.desc: Bunnicula is an animated comedy series based on the bestselling childrens book of the same name. The series features the paranormal comedy adventures of Bunnicula the vampire rabbit, Chester the paranoid cat, and Harold the loyal family dog. Together, our heroes protect their owner Mina and the city of New Orleans from spooky supernatural creatures… including Bunnicula himself!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") After that, theyll definitely go fight some crime. Maybe. Dont miss the return of Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg - teen super heroes who are totally unsupervised!.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When Grizz, Panda, and Ice Bear catch the attention of the Department of Wildlife Control, their world turns upside down. Their quest to become the ultimate internet stars attracts the attention of a threat that could tear them apart and sends them on a quest far, far beyond the bear cave! The Bears are left with no choice but to go on the run. Leaving their home in San Francisco, they head towards a land where bears are more at home than anywhere else: Canada.

programme.title: Bunnicula
programme.desc: Bunnicula is an animated comedy series based on the bestselling childrens book of the same name. The series features the paranormal comedy adventures of Bunnicula the vampire rabbit, Chester the paranoid cat, and Harold the loyal family dog. Together, our heroes protect their owner Mina and the city of New Orleans from spooky supernatural creatures… including Bunnicula himself!

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Tiny Toons Looniversity follows Babs and Buster Bunny, Sweetie Bird, Hamton J. Pig, and Plucky Duck as they learn what it takes to be a professional toon under the tutelage of Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck and other looney legends.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai – a sarcastic blue jay, and Rigby – a somewhat responsible raccoon, are best friends. They even work together at a park owned by Pops, a big lollipop-headed guy. Which seems normal enough. They’ve got a cranky gumball machine for a boss and they work alongside a Zen-like yeti named Skips. Yep. Everything is as regular as can be.

programme.title: Regular Show

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

programme.title: Craig Before the Creek
programme.desc: Before he was Craig of the Creek, he was just Craig - a new kid in a new town. All Craig wants is to go back to his old friends at his old home. But when he learns that the nearby creek is hiding a lost treasure that could make his wish come true, Craig sets off on a journey to find it - navigating the perilous suburban wilderness, and forging new friendships, all while being pursued by a fearsome band of pirates who are bent on destroying the Creek itself.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: Darwins Yearbook
programme.desc: Darwin is in charge of Elmores Yearbook and hes gathering images of a number of his friends in order to complete it. After Principal Brown gives him the task of making the school yearbook, Darwin, with the help of Gumball, travels across different locations with the aim of taking the best possible picture, but they must solve puzzles along the way.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai – a sarcastic blue jay, and Rigby – a somewhat responsible raccoon, are best friends. They even work together at a park owned by Pops, a big lollipop-headed guy. Which seems normal enough. They’ve got a cranky gumball machine for a boss and they work alongside a Zen-like yeti named Skips. Yep. Everything is as regular as can be.

programme.title: Regular Show

programme.title: Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: You’ve heard of scaredy cats, but what about a scaredy dog? Meet Courage, a timid pup whose #1 job is to defend his owners, Muriel and Eustace, from the ghoulies and ghosties that lurk around their farmhouse in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas. He’s got a few special tricks to keep the homestead safe. Shake, Courage, shake!

programme.title: Cow and Chicken
programme.desc: A scrawny, 11-year-old chicken named Chicken reluctantly watches out for his beefy "little" sister, a 7-year-old cow named Cow.

programme.title: Adventure Time

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Kampsportelskende Lan Jun, en tenåringsheltinne som må lære familiens gamle hemmeligheter for å oppdage det uventede. Samtidig skal hun leve livet som tenåring.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: Den tapre prins Ivandoes heroiske ferd" er fortellingen om et ungt rådyr på sitt livs største eventyr. Ivandoe er skogens unge prins. En dag vil han etterfølge sin far og herske som konge...

programme.desc: Når Department of Wildlife Control får ferten av Grizz, Panda og Ice Bear, snus tilværelsen deres på hodet! programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Leader’s Playbook” is an in-depth series that features exclusive, candid interviews with America’s top CEOs and explores the leadership philosophies and the strategic and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies. Hosted by CNBC’s Senior Media and Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin, each episode offers a rare glimpse into the mindset of visionary leaders, revealing how they navigate challenges, drive innovation, and build success.

programme.title: HobbyMania - Tausch mit mir dein Hobby!
programme.desc: Zwei Kids tauschen jeweils ihr Hobby und mussen eine Challenge bestehen. Zu Beginn jeder Episode stellt jeder Protagonist sein Hobby vor, weist den Tauschpartner ein und vereinbart mit ihm ein konkretes Ziel (oder Herausforderung), welches am Ende der Folge eingelost beziehungsweise aufgelost wird. Jeder Tauschpartner ist also im Film einmal sowohl Ausprobierender als auch Coach. Die Protagonisten entdecken in der „HobbyMania“ neue Lebensumfelder, probieren komplett Neues aus, wechseln die Perspektive und schlieSSen neue Freundschaften.

programme.title: Unerschrocken! Echte Heldinnen
programme.desc: "Unerschrocken" ist eine Serie nach den Bestseller-Comics "Culottees" von Penelope Bagieu, die zuerst online auf Le Monde.fr veroffentlicht wurde. Alle Figuren in "Unerschrocken" werden von Anke Engelke gesprochen.

programme.title: Anna und die wilden Tiere
programme.desc: Sie trifft Menschen, die es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht haben, wilden Tieren ein Leben in Freiheit zu ermoglichen. Hier packt Anna mit an.

programme.title: Checker Tobi und das Geheimnis unseres Planeten
programme.desc: Das groSSte Abenteuer seines Lebens beginnt fur Checker Tobi auf einem Piratenschiff mitten im Meer. Als er bei einem Schwertkampf ins Wasser sturzt, entdeckt er eine Flaschenpost, in der ein geheimnisvolles Ratsel steckt:"Blicke ins Herz der Erde.Wecke den Baren mit acht Beinen.Lies im Gedachtnis der Welt.Sammle den wertvollsten Schatz Indiens.Und du wirst das Geheimnisunseres Planeten luften."Dieses Ratsel will Tobi unbedingt losen – und schlittert in eine spannende Schnitzeljagd um die Welt.

programme.title: Quarks im Ersten
programme.desc: Bei Quarks soll Wissenschaft unterhalten. Deshalb fahrt die Sendung alles auf, was das Fernsehen zu bieten hat: spannende Experimente, abenteuerliche Selbstversuche, uberzeugende Grafiken und faszinierende Computeranimationen. Dabei ist jede Sendung ein Unikat! Quarks nimmt den Zuschauer mit auf eine spannende Entdeckungsreise und hilft ihm die Geheimnisse der Welt zu entratseln.

programme.title: Hotel Heidelberg
programme.desc: Geschichten eines kultigen Familienbetriebes und seiner Gaste erzahlt die Reihe "Hotel Heidelberg" vor der malerischen Kulisse der weltberuhmten Residenz- und Universitatsstadt. Zur Machtprobe zwischen Tochter und Mutter kommt es in der ersten Folge "Kramer gegen Kramer": Ulrike C. Tscharre als tuchtige Geschaftsfuhrerin und Hannelore Hoger in der Rolle der charismatischen Grunderin verkorpern grandios die beiden Hauptfiguren des Generationenkonflikts.

programme.title: Sportabzeichen fur Anfanger
programme.desc: Zu den schwierigsten Disziplinen zahlt es, uber den eigenen Schatten zu springen. Mit dieser Lebensweisheit glaubt Bertram Dinkler (Christian Berkel), von Beruf Keksfabrikant und alles andere als ein Sportjunkie, bewegungsfaulen Mitschulerinnen seiner Tochter Charlotte (Maja Meinhardt) auf die Sprunge helfen zu konnen. Seine altvaterliche Besserwisserei lost jedoch nicht bei den Jugendlichen, sondern der alleinerziehenden Mutter Stefanie Eckhoff (Andrea Sawatzki) einen unerwarteten Kampfgeist aus.

programme.title: Das Wort zum Sonntag
programme.desc: Lernen Sie die vier evangelischen und vier katholischen Sprecherinnen und Sprecher des "Wort zum Sonntag" kennen.

programme.desc: Der ehemalige Hamburger Polizist Hauke Jacobs mochte im Ostsee-Stadtchen Schwanitz als Tierarzt neu anfangen. Doch immer wieder kommen ihm mysteriose Verbrechen dazwischen.

programme.desc: Zu den schwierigsten Disziplinen zahlt es, uber den eigenen Schatten zu springen. Mit dieser Lebensweisheit glaubt Bertram Dinkler (Christian Berkel), von Beruf Keksfabrikant und alles andere als ein Sportjunkie, bewegungsfaulen Mitschulerinnen seiner Tochter Charlotte (Maja Meinhardt) auf die Sprunge helfen zu konnen. Seine altvaterliche Besserwisserei lost jedoch nicht bei den Jugendlichen, sondern der alleinerziehenden Mutter Stefanie Eckhoff (Andrea Sawatzki) einen unerwarteten Kampfgeist aus.

programme.title: Nord bei Nordwest
programme.desc: Der ehemalige Hamburger Polizist Hauke Jacobs mochte im Ostsee-Stadtchen Schwanitz als Tierarzt neu anfangen. Doch immer wieder kommen ihm mysteriose Verbrechen dazwischen.

programme.title: Brisant
programme.desc: Traume und Tragodien, menschliche und tierische Schicksale liefern den Stoff fur Brisant, das tagliche Boulevard-Magazin der ARD. Eine Mischung aus Information und Unterhaltung: schnell, spannend.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Druckfrisch
programme.desc: Denis Scheck stellt Ihnen die besten Romane, Sachbucher und naturlich die Schriftsteller zu diesen vor. AuSSerdem nimmt er die aktuellen Bestseller unter die Lupe. Mit "druckfrisch" entdecken Sie die Welt der Bucher.

programme.title: Überflieger - Kleine Vogel, groSSes Geklapper
programme.desc: Der verwaiste Spatz Richard wird liebevoll von einer Storchenfamilie aufgezogen. Ihm wurde nicht im Traum einfallen, dass er selbst kein Storch ist. Als sich seine Storcheneltern und sein -bruder im Herbst fur den langen Flug ins warme Afrika vorbereiten, offenbaren sie Richard die Wahrheit: Ein kleiner Spatz ist nicht geschaffen fur eine Reise wie diese. Sie mussen ihn schweren Herzens zurucklassen.

programme.title: Checker Julian
programme.desc: Checkers Julian geht Ihnen jede Woche einem anderen Thema auf den Grund.

programme.title: Coco Farm
programme.desc: Nach seinem unfreiwilligen Umzug aufs Land, plant der geschaftstuchtige Max mit seinem Cousin eine Bio-Huhnerfarm zu grunden. Doch es gibt viele Hurden.

programme.title: Die kluge Bauerntochter
programme.desc: Ein Garten auf dem Dach ihrer armlichen Hutte! Mit dieser Idee verblufft die kluge Bauerntochter den Konig dermaSSen, dass er ihrem Vater das auf diese Weise trickreich erbetene Stuck Rodeland tatsachlich uberlasst. So viel Witz und Selbstbewusstsein ist der Konig nicht gewohnt. Er ist gelangweilt von solchen Prinzessinnen wie Eulalia, die ihm seine Mutter in der Hoffnung auf eine standesgemaSSe Heirat einladt. Viel lieber beobachtet der Konig mit seinem Fernrohr die Sterne.

programme.title: Die Sendung mit der Maus
programme.desc: Lach- und Sachgeschichten, Slapstick mit Oskar, Armins verrucktem Fruhstuck, einem Tanzwettbewerb auf der Farm – und naturlich mit der Maus, dem Elefanten und der Ente.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Ostern in Rom
programme.desc: Ostern ist einer der Hohepunkte im Kirchenjahr: das Fest der Auferstehung und des Lebens. Papst Franziskus zelebriert auf dem mit Tausenden Blumen geschmuckten Petersplatz den feierlichen Ostergottesdienst. AnschlieSSend spendet er den apostolischen Segen "Urbi et Orbi". Dazu werden Pilger und Glaubige aus aller Welt in Rom erwartet. Es kommentieren Monsignore Erwin Albrecht und Elisabeth Most.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Herzdamen an der Elbe
programme.desc: Wer in Dresden nach osterreichischer Kuche sucht, geht ins Restaurant "Lieblich an der Elbe", das Maria Lieblich mit ihren Freundinnen erfolgreich etabliert hat. Doch die Bank sitzt den Gastronominnen mit hohen Kreditforderungen im Nacken. Als ihnen der Reeder Hermann Augartner einen lukrativen Catering-Job offeriert, sehen die Damen ihre groSSe Chance gekommen, sich aus der Notlage zu befreien.

programme.title: Verliebt in Masuren
programme.desc: Das Leben hat Seemann Kurt hart gemacht. Warum er so unwirsch ist, behalt er lieber fur sich. Als nach einem verpatzten Segeltorn Rundumpflege notig ist, verscheucht Kurt jede helfende Hand. Die Einzige, die ihm Paroli bieten kann, ist die aus den Masuren stammende, resolute Polin Roza. Zu dumm, dass in einer Woche ihre Tochter Ewa heiratet und Roza dann wieder heim muss. Als bis dahin keine Ablosung fur sie eintrifft, wagt Roza den Sprung ins Ungewisse und nimmt Kurt kurzerhand mit zu sich. Wirklich glucklich wirkt Kurt daruber nicht, auch wenn er Rozas Gesellschaft mittlerweile heimlich genieSSt.

programme.title: Holy Days: Oliver Mommsen und das Ratsel Ostern
programme.desc: Ostern - ein Grund zum Feiern? Schauspieler Oliver Mommsen hat den Bezug zum Fest verloren. Feiertags-Experte Gabriel Engel schickt den ehemaligen Tatort-Ermittler deshalb auf einen magischen Roadtrip. Unterwegs trifft er den dienstaltesten Osterhasen, leidenschaftliche Osterfans und begibt sich auf eine biblische Zeitreise. Kann Oliver Mommsen das Ratsel hinter Ostern entschlusseln?

programme.title: Mord auf Shetland
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jimmy Perezl ist auf den kargen Shetland-Inseln geboren. Nach einer langen Zeit in London kehrt er nun als alleinerziehender Vater mit seiner Tochter Cassie zuruck. Hier versucht er den Neuanfang und ermittelt in Mordfallen.

programme.desc: If you love urban exploration, forgotten architecture, and the stories hidden in decay, then Georgia should be your next adventure destination. programme.title: Inside The Arrest
programme.desc: British police make 2,000 arrests a day, but one bad move can endanger themselves and jeopardise a whole investigation. Frontline experts analyse footage of the most dramatic arrest footage, revealing the detailed planning that goes into each operation.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The hosts team up to find and flip serviceable used classic cars. Mike scours the Internet and local trade rags for bargain-priced modern classics needing attention. Edd China (and in later seasons, Ant Anstead) applies the elbow grease to bring the cars up to a nearly new condition, allowing Mike to "sell them on" for a profit.

The bigger the hoard of forgotten antiques and dusty furniture, the happier Drew is!

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: In the face of an economic meltdown, six men will risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold. Todd Hoffman, along with his father, is leading a group of greenhorn miners in search of the American dream and a new frontier. Gold fever is back, and the rush is on. The gold miners of the Yukon are back to put everything on the line in the hopes of striking it rich. With new miners, new claims and new machines, the stakes are higher than ever!

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: In the face of an economic meltdown, six men will risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold. programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.desc: The extraordinary, often bizarre treasures housed in Americas museums represent wondrous chapters in history, but a physical display can tell only part of their story. Behind each artefact are amazing tales and secrets to be revealed - tales sometimes brimming with scandal, mystery, murder and intrigue. In `Mysteries at the Museum, presenter Don Wildman visits a wide variety of museums across the United States, taking viewers on a sometimes shocking tour of Americas past by re-examining whats been left behind. Interviews, archival footage and re-enactments bring to life the artefacts enduring mysteries, some that have never been told before on television.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Master of mystery Josh Gates explores a treasure trove of mind-bending mysteries, carefully curated during his two decades of travelling the globe. Josh travels through history on a search to uncover new evidence and answers to the worlds most captivating unexplained mysteries, and true stories that defy explanation, offering stunning revelations and surprising new insights.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Intrigued by legendary mysteries and driven by curiosity, Josh Gates is on a mission for answers. "Expedition Unknown" chronicles his global adventures as he investigates iconic unsolved events, lost cities, buried treasures and other puzzling stories. Armed with a degree in archaeology, a quick wit and a thirst for action, Gates investigates recent developments before embarking on a detailed exploration. Whether hes trekking through Fiji in search of Amelia Earharts remains or diving the deep seas of Panama to locate Captain Morgans pirate ship, Gates roughshod expeditions lead him one step closer to the truth.

programme.title: Abalone Wars
programme.desc: Abalone is a multi-million dollar industry in South Australia. Crews reveal the treacherous ocean conditions, unpredictable weather and growing risk of shark attacks that plague their work diving for abalone.

programme.title: American Loggers
programme.desc: Nine brothers carry on the family tradition of harvesting the forests of the northern Maine. Its one of the worlds most hazardous jobs and takes guts and dedication to make a living out of the trees.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: Any building project is stressful especially if the build is in the middle of nowhere and in the challenging area. But nothing can stop those enthusiasts who want to live off the grid and build their dream homes in the verdant Wisconsin countryside, rural Illinois, in Maine overlooking the Atlantic Ocean, in Montanas Flathead Valley or a homestead build in the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: How the Universe Works is a documentary science TV series, answering all questions about jaw dropping structure of Universe. Get the answers to all questions like if there are any habitable planets in our Galaxy, what is Big Bang theory in details, how a black hole is born, explore a whole range of fascinating cosmos phenomena.

programme.title: Dino Hunters
programme.desc: Ankylosaurus, Triceratops, or Velociraptor: Where cattle graze today, dinosaurs ruled the earth until 65 million years ago. Now, the remains of these prehistoric giants lie buried in sedimentary rock, waiting to be unearthed. Dino hunters like Clayton Phipps, Jared Hudson, and Mike Harris are taking on the task. Ranchers and cowboys want to turn these prehistoric treasures into cash! The fossil discoveries are also important for science. Using 3D scanners and high-tech computer models, experts are bringing the hidden world of dinosaurs back to life.

programme.title: Blowing Up History
programme.desc: From the Pyramids to the Parthenon and Big Ben in London, UNEARTHED reveals the deepest secrets of each structure by using the latest technology to solve mysteries such as how the Parthenon still stands against earthquakes; how sticky rice was used to build the Great Wall of China; and what sacred secret lies beneath the Mayan temples of Chichen Itza?

programme.title: Extreme Engineering
programme.desc: Each episode of Extreme Engineering features a major construction and engineering project. Some projects are completed ones, like the new Hong Kong airport. Other projects are those under construction like the Gotthard Base Tunnel under the Alps. Still other episodes showcase futuristic projects that may never be built, like the Transatlantic Tunnel. Most episodes examine possible disaster scenarios that could threaten the projects.

programme.title: Savage Builds
programme.desc: Adam Savage delves into an unpredictable world, taking on the most absurd challenges only he could dream up! He engineers inventive builds to discover new information.

programme.title: Space Launch: Splashdown
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX launch the first crewed mission from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Behind the scenes coverage of the SpaceX Dragon Capsule water landing.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Chip and Chap: Nøddepatruljen
programme.desc: Chip og Chap leder en lille gruppe dyrefigurer, der overvåger menneskenes og dyrenes verden. Nøddepatruljen løser mysterier, uanset hvor de dukker op.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Det er Plutos fødselsdagsfest!

programme.title: Løvernes garde
programme.desc: Tiden er inde! Følg med, når Kion, den næstældste af Simba og Nalas løveunger, bliver leder af løvernes garde og indkalder de bedste og klogeste til at hjælpe ham med at holde livets kredsløb intakt.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Mickey, Anders og Fedtmule prøver at rengøre et ur i et tårn.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner (kortfilm)
programme.desc: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner samarbejder for at bekæmpe skurke og redde folk i problemer. Mød heltene, som hjælper Spidey med at redde dagen!

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb

Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: The series follows Kiff, an optimistic squirrel whose thirst for life takes her on countless adventures through her town, alongside Barry, her chill bunny bestie. Set in a world where animals and magical oddballs tackle day-to-day life together, the duo navigate school, relationships, and their often-eccentric community.

programme.title: Miraculous Tales Of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien are back for more exciting adventures! While they live normal lives, they also transform into the superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir to defend Paris from any threat Hawk Moth sends their way, including a villain whose drawings come to life, a monster that feeds on fear, and a dark knight with plans to rule Paris!

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: A teenage girl from Transylvania enrolls in boarding school to chase her musical dreams, and she attempts to keep it a secret that she is actually a vampire while navigating various obstacles and challenges along the way.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, a powerful young wizard at the center of a mysterious prophecy, is sent to live in the mortal world with the only wizard teacher who can help her control her powers—Justin Russo.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!
